CommunityApplications.Profile: VideoWare is a free, open-source video editor that runs entirely in your browser and on your server. Upload media, create clips, edit timelines, and collaborate with other users on the same project in real time. It's self-hosted: everything runs in one container with one data path. Optionally enable Video Intelligence to unlock universal search across your media. This is an open alternative to closed source video editing platforms. Supports local file storage or S3 object storage. For questions, bug reports, and support, please use the GitHub issue tracker.
